description: You are working on a Python-based SVG animation generator located at /home/ga/workspace/svg_animator/. Motion designers have reported five bugs causing visual artifacts: easing curves feel inverted, color transitions are incorrect, circular arc paths render as their complement, the last frame of every animation is missing, and non-square animations appear distorted due to viewBox issues. Fix these logical errors in the source code within the animation/ and svg/ directories until the test suite in tests/ passes. Do not modify the test files.

metadata.industry: Arts, Design, Entertainment, Sports, and Media
